COMPONENT / USE CASE IN THIS PROJECT: EC2 cost is FIXED regardless of keyword volume. Spread over more keywords = cheaper per keyword.
Bright Data is the LARGEST variable cost. It scales linearly with every SERP request.
OpenAI GPT-4o-mini is very cheap for the main pipeline. The big cost jumper is gpt-4o-search-preview in the experimental script.
Supabase free tier covers ~50,000 rows. At 1000 keywords per project with metadata, this covers 50 projects before upgrade needed.
Firecrawl API key (fc-3897dbc7f2da4e3ba0da80d146edd393) is HARDCODED in firecrawl_scraper.py line 29 — should be moved to .env immediately.
Redis/Upstash is no longer used in the current branch (feature/remove-vercel). Removing it saves $0 (was on free tier) but avoids connection overhead.
Claude API is referenced in the Dockerfile env comment (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) and anthropic package is in requirements.txt — but no .env key is set yet.
All per-keyword costs assume 1 keyword = 1 run. Re-running the same keyword doubles the cost.
